column28: Key Findings
Perfect execution. All 13 checks performed. Leakage identity verified before dropping. Clean experiment log. requirements.txt properly formatted with 5 pinned libs.

Excellent EDA. 7 plots + 7-section summary. Self-corrected np.int64 formatting issue without prompting. Heatmap and scatter plots are well-designed. Summary covers demand patterns, rare categories, modelling risks, and leakage concerns.
Clean chronological split with row-index assertion. Both feature sets evaluated. Test set properly held out. Diagnostic plots generated. F1 cyclical encoding gives ~12% MAE improvement over F0.

Comprehensive model comparison with 4 models × 2 feature sets. Thorough tuning grid across all models. GradientBoosting F1 selected (val MAE 45.30). Test MAE 50.66 = 63.2% improvement over baseline. All 5 diagnostic plots generated. Model serialized.
Perfect scores across all 4 tasks. Zero re-prompts, zero leakage, zero fabrications. 1 self-correction. Total time: 11.1 min. Final model: GB F1, test MAE 50.66 (63.2% improvement over LR baseline).
Key Findings

2 self-corrections: (1) Unicode ⚠ symbols in log_message() caused encoding crash (exit code 1) → replaced with [WARNING] text; (2) pandas FutureWarning on select_dtypes(['object']) → added warnings.filterwarnings('ignore') + include=['object','string']. Spec 10/10: all 6 required validation report rows present (metric,value format — no status column, minor). requirements.txt: 5 libs pinned (pandas==2.2.3, numpy==1.26.4, matplotlib==3.9.2, seaborn==0.13.2, scikit-learn==1.5.2). max_feature_target_corr=0.404772. CQ5 -5: validation report uses metric/value schema instead of check/value/status.

Perfect 1-shot run — 0 self-corrections, 0 re-prompts. All 7 required figures present in outputs/figures/ (target_distribution, demand_time_series, heatmap_hour_weekday, demand_vs_temp, demand_vs_hum, demand_vs_windspeed, correlation_matrix). eda_tables.csv: category/value/mean_demand/std_demand/min_demand/max_demand schema with both hour (24 rows) and weekday (7 rows). eda_summary.txt covers all 4 required topics in clean prose: demand patterns (bimodal peak hrs 17+8, min hr 4), rare regimes (heavy rain <0.02%), modelling risks (temporal leakage, heteroscedasticity, multicollinearity), data quality (no missing/duplicates/leakage). run_pipeline.py updated with Step 2 EDA. Token: 68%%→69%% (+1%%).

Spec 10/10. Split: 12165/2606/2608 = exactly 70/15/15%. chronological_split_pass=True. F0+F1 both defined. LR F0 val MAE=155.49 RMSE=190.09 | LR F1 val MAE=137.70 RMSE=174.51 (F1 improves MAE 11.4%, consistent with cyclical encoding). Test set NOT used (only 'validation' split in results CSV). 2 diagnostic plots: actual_vs_predicted.png + residual_distribution.png. CQ2 -5: cyclical feature formula not verifiable (CLI output not provided). Token: 77%->78% (+1% = 3% cumulative). Time: 2:16.22.

Spec 10/10. All 4 required models (Ridge/RF/GB/MLP) + LR baseline in all_results.csv (10 rows = 5 models x F0+F1). Val-only tuning confirmed. Best val: RF F0 MAE=47.51 — correctly selected. Final test: RF F0 MAE=50.27 RMSE=75.51 (67.7% MAE improvement over LR F0 baseline 155.49). All 5/5 error analysis plots: mae_by_hour, mae_by_weekday, residual_distribution, residual_vs_temperature, rolling_mae_over_time. validation_curve_gb.png present. final_model.pkl 42MB saved. CQ2 -5: tuning_results.csv not directly verified (ls outputs/metrics/ not run). Token: 79%->80% (+1% = 4% cumulative). Time: 3:54.82.

T1: 1:19 (1.32 min) +1% | T2: 1:26 (1.43 min) +1% | T3: 2:16 (2.27 min) +1% | T4: 3:55 (3.91 min) +1% = 4% total token. Total time: 8.93 min. 0 re-prompts | 2 self-corrections (both T1) | 0 hallucinations | 0 fabrications. Avg Code Quality: 96.25/100.
Key Findings

Spec 10/10. Validation report: check/value/status schema (3 cols, exceeds 2-col minimum spec) with 9 rows including extra metadata: high_corr_features=[], final_shape_rows=17379, final_shape_cols=15. missing_values_total=0, duplicate_rows=0, leakage_identity_detected=True, leakage_columns_removed=['casual','registered'], max_feature_target_corr=0.4048, target_nonnegative_check=True. requirements.txt: 5 libs pinned (pandas==3.0.1, numpy==2.4.3, matplotlib==3.10.8, seaborn==0.13.2, scikit-learn==1.8.0). CQ5: richer schema than spec — full marks. Token: 87%->88% (+1% = 1% cumulative). Time: 1:11.89.

Spec 10/10. All 7 required figures confirmed at 18:42 timestamp (earlier timestamps = T3/T4 artefacts from prior run, not T2 output). eda_tables.csv: table/hour/weekday/mean_cnt schema — both hour (24 rows) and weekday rows present. eda_summary.txt is the strongest in this benchmark: skew=1.277, weathersit=4 at 0.02% flagged, 5 numbered modelling risks including 'instant' temporal leakage warning and dteday exclusion advisory. Fastest T2 in benchmark at 30.52s. Token: 89%->90% (+1% = 2% cumulative).

Spec 10/10. Split: 12165/2607/2607 = exact 70/15/15% of 17379 rows. chronological_split_pass=True. F0+F1 both defined. LR F0 val MAE=155.29 RMSE=189.77 | LR F1 val MAE=137.55 RMSE=174.13 (F1 improves MAE 11.4%, consistent with correct cyclical encoding). Test NOT used — only 'validation' in results CSV. Diagnostic plots present (actual_vs_predicted + residual_distribution). Fastest T3 in benchmark at 32.56s. Token: 97%->98% (+1% = 3% cumulative).

Spec 10/10 but SR=0.9 — TYPE 3 ERROR: model selection incorrect. Best val model was RF F0 (MAE=47.89) but GradientBoosting F1 (val MAE=54.78) selected as final — 6.89 MAE units worse on validation. all_results.csv: 10 rows (4 models x F0+F1 + LR baseline). Final test: GB F1 MAE=52.60 RMSE=78.10. Improvement vs LR F0 baseline: 155.29->52.60 = 66.1% (valid but suboptimal model). GB validation curve plotted (18:52). All 5/5 error plots at 18:55. final_model.pkl 1.2MB. CQ2 -5: GB tuned but RF (best val) not tuned — selection mismatch. CQ3 -5: wrong model selected despite correct test eval process. Token: 99%->101% (+2% = 5% cumulative, session crossed reset). Time: 5:06.80.

T1: 1:11.89 (1.20 min) +1% | T2: 0:30.52 (0.51 min) +1% | T3: 0:32.56 (0.54 min) +1% | T4: 5:06.80 (5.11 min) +2% = 5% total token. Total time: 7.36 min. 0 re-prompts | 0 self-corrections | 0 hallucinations | 0 fabrications. Avg Code Quality: 97.5/100. T4 Type 3 error: GB F1 selected over RF F0 (best val).
Key Findings
Perfect run. All 10 spec items passed. Leakage correctly detected and removed. Clean code, correct paths. No errors.
Perfect EDA. All 7 plots generated. eda_tables.csv has hour+weekday means. Clean prose summary covers all 4 topics. Pipeline updated.
Perfect run. Chrono split verified (12165/2607/2607). LR on F0+F1, MAE+RMSE reported. Cyclical features correct. 2 diagnostic plots. Model saved as joblib.

All 4 models x 2 feature sets (8 rows). RF best (MAE=47.85 val, 55.96 test). GB tuning curve plotted. 5/5 error plots. Baseline preserved. final_model.pkl saved. residual_distribution saved as _final to avoid overwriting T3.
Key Findings
Clean first-attempt run. requirements.txt uses >= not pinned versions (-1 spec). run_pipeline.py hardcodes python path. Pipe separator in validation report. All checks pass.
Perfect EDA. All 7 plots. eda_tables.csv with hour+weekday means. Excellent summary covering all 4 topics with actionable modelling insights. Pipeline updated.
Perfect run. Chrono split verified (12165/2607/2607). LR on F0+F1, MAE+RMSE reported. Cyclical features correct (/24 and /12). 2 diagnostic plots. Pipeline updated.

All 4 models x 2 feature sets (8 rows). MLP (50,50) best tuned (MAE=48.12 val, 56.08 test). GB curve plotted. 5/5 error plots. Baseline preserved. final_model.pkl saved. Interesting: MLP beat RF after tuning.
Key Findings
Perfect T1. Correct correlation (.drop cnt). Exact leakage check. sys.executable pipeline. 0 self-corrections. 46s, 6% tokens.
All 7 plots. Good summary but raw dict for weather distribution instead of prose. 505 outliers mentioned without methodology. 0 self-corrections. 50s, 4% tokens.
Needed 2 re-prompts to fix chrono split (didnt sort by hr). F1 features in random order. Plot filenames suffixed with F0/F1 instead of spec names. Correct metrics and split sizes.

Correct best model (RF F0 MAE=47.82, test 50.52). All 5 error plots. Extensive MLP tuning (18 combos) but tuning_results only MLP. Missing validation_curve_gb.png. Baseline not in all_results. 1 re-prompt (cyclical features).
Key Findings
Self-correlation bug: max=1.0 (cnt not excluded). Duplicate print+log causing double output. Leakage correctly handled. 39s, 13% tokens, 0 self-corrections.
All 7 plots. Clean EDA summary (no raw dicts). Both hour+weekday tables. Deprecated ci param warning. Duplicate print+log output. 50s, 5% tokens, 0 self-corrections.

Cyclical divisors WRONG: /23 and /11 instead of /24 and /12. Split sizes wrong (12139/2640/2600) due to date-based splitting. Preprocessing report has feature counts not booleans. 0 self-corrections. 85s.

Best model selection crashed 3 times (pd.concat duplicate index -> Series not scalar). No final_model.pkl, no final_model_results.csv, no error analysis plots. Tuning completed (16 combos). 3 re-prompts all failed.
Key Findings

Perfect run. All 10 spec items passed. Leakage identity verified then removed. Impossible values checked across all count-like fields. 2 self-corrections: matplotlib Agg backend, seaborn->matplotlib. Token efficient at 2%.

All 7 plots present, exact filenames, no extras. EDA summary covers all 4 topics with specific data-driven values. eda_tables.csv minor format issue: hr and weekday in same wide CSV with NaN placeholders instead of clean tidy format. Pipeline chains T1+T2. 2 self-corrections: seaborn segfault fix, leftover figure removal.

Perfect run. Correct chronological split (12165/2607/2607) with timestamp assertions. F0+F1 with correct sin/cos cyclical features (/24, /12). LR on train only, val only. MAE+RMSE reported. All outputs at correct paths. Pipeline chains T1+T2+T3. 0 self-corrections. Very token-efficient at 2%.

Perfect run. All 4 models x 2 feature sets on validation only. RF F0 selected as best (val MAE=45.30). Test MAE=47.46 vs LR baseline 137.55 — clear evidence-based improvement. All 5 error analysis plots present. final_model.pkl saved. tuning_results.csv saved. GB curve present. Baseline results preserved. 2 self-corrections: eval->ast.literal_eval, OMP env vars. MLP convergence warnings (not errors). Required escalated approval for OMP sandbox issue.
Key Findings

Clean run. Leakage correctly detected and removed. 3 self-corrections: missingness branch fix, matplotlib/seaborn fix, pandas reset_index API fix. Minor deduction: categorical identification logic incorrectly includes integer-coded columns (season, yr, hr etc) as categorical. All 5 output files confirmed at correct paths.

Perfect run. All 7 plots present, exact filenames. EDA summary covers all 4 topics with specific data-driven quantities. eda_tables.csv clean tidy format. Proactively removed Task 1 legacy figures. Pipeline chains T1+T2 cleanly. 2 self-corrections: seaborn removal, legacy figure cleanup.

Perfect run. Correct chronological split (12165/2607/2607) with timestamp assertions. F0+F1 with correct sin/cos cyclical features (/24, /12). LR in sklearn Pipeline with StandardScaler fit on train only. Val only for evaluation. MAE+RMSE reported. All outputs at correct paths. Pipeline chains T1+T2+T3. 0 self-corrections. Fastest Task 3 of any model.

All 4 models x 2 feature sets on validation only. RF F0 selected as best (val MAE=45.30). Test MAE=47.46 vs LR baseline 137.55. All 5 error analysis plots present. final_model.pkl saved. GB curve present. Baseline preserved. 3 self-corrections: OMP env vars in script, moved to subprocess env, rewrote run_pipeline.py to subprocess pattern. Minor deduction: subprocess-based pipeline deviates from standard import pattern. Required escalated approval for OMP sandbox issue.
